briefdescription.para: Report a validity error.
Report a validity warning.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlValidCtxt *ctxt, xmlDtd *dtd, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *publicId, const xmlChar *systemId)
memberdef.name: xmlAddNotationDecl

briefdescription.para: Register a new notation declaration.

simplesect.para: the notation or NULL on error.

briefdescription.para: Build a copy of a notation table.

simplesect.para: the new xmlNotationTable or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Deallocate the memory used by an entities hash table.
This will dump the content the notation declaration as an XML DTD definition.
This will dump the content of the notation table as an XML DTD definition.
Allocate an element content structure.

detaileddescription.para: Deprecated in favor of xmlNewDocElementContent

parameterdescription.para: the type of element content decl

simplesect.para: the new element content structure or NULL on error.

briefdescription.para: Build a copy of an element content description.

detaileddescription.para: Deprecated, use xmlCopyDocElementContent instead

simplesect.para: the new xmlElementContent or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Free an element content structure.

detaileddescription.para: The whole subtree is removed. Deprecated, use xmlFreeDocElementContent instead

parameterdescription.para: the element content tree to free

briefdescription.para: Allocate an element content structure for the document.

parameterdescription.para: the type of element content decl

simplesect.para: the new element content structure or NULL on error.

briefdescription.para: Build a copy of an element content description.

parameterdescription.para: the document owning the element declaration

simplesect.para: the new xmlElementContent or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Free an element content structure.

detaileddescription.para: The whole subtree is removed.

parameterdescription.para: the document owning the element declaration
the element content tree to free

briefdescription.para: This will dump the content of the element content definition Intended just for the debug routine.

parameterdescription.para: 1 if one must print the englobing parenthesis, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Deprecated, unsafe, use xmlSnprintfElementContent.

parameterdescription.para: 1 if one must print the englobing parenthesis, 0 otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlValidCtxt *ctxt, xmlDtd *dtd, const xmlChar *name, xmlElementTypeVal type, xmlElementContent *content)
memberdef.name: xmlAddElementDecl

briefdescription.para: Register a new element declaration.

parameterdescription.para: the element content tree or NULL

simplesect.para: the entity or NULL on error.

briefdescription.para: Build a copy of an element table.

simplesect.para: the new xmlElementTable or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Deallocate the memory used by an element hash table.
This will dump the content of the element table as an XML DTD definition.
This will dump the content of the element declaration as an XML DTD definition.
Create and initialize an enumeration attribute node.

simplesect.para: the xmlEnumeration just created or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Free an enumeration attribute node (recursive).
Copy an enumeration attribute node (recursive).

simplesect.para: the xmlEnumeration just created or NULL in case of error.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlValidCtxt *ctxt, xmlDtd *dtd, const xmlChar *elem, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *ns, xmlAttributeType type, xmlAttributeDefault def, const xmlChar *defaultValue, xmlEnumeration *tree)
memberdef.name: xmlAddAttributeDecl

briefdescription.para: Register a new attribute declaration.

parameterdescription.para: if it's an enumeration, the associated list

simplesect.para: the attribute decl or NULL on error.

briefdescription.para: Build a copy of an attribute table.

simplesect.para: the new xmlAttributeTable or NULL in case of error.

briefdescription.para: Deallocate the memory used by an entities hash table.
This will dump the content of the attribute table as an XML DTD definition.
This will dump the content of the attribute declaration as an XML DTD definition.
Add an attribute to the docment's ID table.

simplesect.para: 1 on success, 0 if the ID already exists, -1 if a memory allocation fails.

briefdescription.para: Add an attribute to the docment's ID table.

parameterdescription.para: pointer to the document, must equal attr->doc

simplesect.para: the new xmlID or NULL on error.

briefdescription.para: Deallocate the memory used by an ID hash table.
Search the document's ID table for the attribute with the given ID.

simplesect.para: the attribute or NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: Determine whether an attribute is of type ID.

detaileddescription.para: In case we have DTD(s) then this is done if DTD loading has been requested. In case of HTML documents parsed with the HTML parser, ID detection is done systematically.

simplesect.para: 0 or 1 depending on the lookup result or -1 if a memory allocation failed.

briefdescription.para: Remove the given attribute from the document's ID table.

simplesect.para: -1 if the lookup failed and 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Register a new ref declaration.

xrefdescription.para: Don't use. This function will be removed from the public API.

simplesect.para: the new xmlRef or NULL o error.

briefdescription.para: Deallocate the memory used by an Ref hash table.

xrefdescription.para: Don't use. This function will be removed from the public API.

briefdescription.para: Determine whether an attribute is of type Ref.

detaileddescription.para: In case we have DTD(s) then this is simple, otherwise we use an heuristic: name Ref (upper or lowercase).

xrefdescription.para: Don't use. This function will be removed from the public API.

simplesect.para: 0 or 1 depending on the lookup result.

briefdescription.para: Remove the given attribute from the Ref table maintained internally.

xrefdescription.para: Don't use. This function will be removed from the public API.

simplesect.para: -1 if the lookup failed and 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Find the set of references for the supplied ID.

xrefdescription.para: Don't use. This function will be removed from the public API.

simplesect.para: the list of nodes matching the ID or NULL on error.

briefdescription.para: The public function calls related to validity checking.

detaileddescription.para: The public function calls related to validity checking.

simplesect.para: the new validation context or NULL if a memory allocation failed.

briefdescription.para: Free a validation context structure.
Try to validate the root element.

detaileddescription.para: Performs the following check as described by the XML-1.0 recommendation:
It doesn't try to recurse or apply other checks to the element.

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Try to validate a single element definition.

detaileddescription.para: Performs the following checks as described by the XML-1.0 recommendation:

listitem.para: [ VC: One ID per Element Type ]

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Performs the validation-related extra step of the normalization of attribute values:

detaileddescription.para: If the declared value is not CDATA, then the XML processor must further process the normalized attribute value by discarding any leading and trailing space (#x20) characters, and by replacing sequences of space (#x20) characters by single space (#x20) character.

simplesect.para: a new normalized string if normalization is needed, NULL otherwise. The caller must free the returned value.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlValidCtxt *ctxt, xmlDoc *doc, xmlNode *elem, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *value)
memberdef.name: xmlValidCtxtNormalizeAttributeValue

briefdescription.para: Performs the validation-related extra step of the normalization of attribute values:

detaileddescription.para: If the declared value is not CDATA, then the XML processor must further process the normalized attribute value by discarding any leading and trailing space (#x20) characters, and by replacing sequences of space (#x20) characters by single space (#x20) character.
Also check VC: Standalone Document Declaration in P32, and update ctxt->valid accordingly

simplesect.para: a new normalized string if normalization is needed, NULL otherwise. The caller must free the returned value.

briefdescription.para: Try to validate a single attribute definition.

detaileddescription.para: Performs the following checks as described by the XML-1.0 recommendation:
The ID/IDREF uniqueness and matching are done separately.

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Validate that the given attribute value matches the proper production.

detaileddescription.para: [ VC: ID ] Values of type ID must match the Name production....
[ VC: IDREF ] Values of type IDREF must match the Name production, and values of type IDREFS must match Names ...
[ VC: Entity Name ] Values of type ENTITY must match the Name production, values of type ENTITIES must match Names ...
[ VC: Name Token ] Values of type NMTOKEN must match the Nmtoken production; values of type NMTOKENS must match Nmtokens.

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Try to validate a single notation definition.

detaileddescription.para: It seems that no validity constraint exists on notation declarations. But this function gets called anyway ...

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Try to validate the document against the DTD instance.

detaileddescription.para: Note that the internal subset (if present) is de-coupled (i.e. not used), which could cause problems if ID or IDREF attributes are present.

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Performs the final validation steps of DTD content once all the subsets have been parsed.

detaileddescription.para: Performs the following checks described by the XML Rec:

listitem.para: check that ENTITY and ENTITIES type attributes default or possible values matches one of the defined entities.
check that NOTATION type attributes default or possible values matches one of the defined notations.

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 if invalid and -1 if not well-formed.

briefdescription.para: Try to validate the document instance.

xrefdescription.para: This function can't report malloc or other failures. Use xmlCtxtValidateDocument.

detaileddescription.para: Performs the all the checks described by the XML Rec, i.e. validates the internal and external subset (if present) and validates the document tree.

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Try to validate the subtree under an element.

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Try to validate a single element and its attributes.

detaileddescription.para: Performs the following checks as described by the XML-1.0 recommendation:
Then calls xmlValidateOneAttribute for each attribute present.
ID/IDREF checks are handled separately.

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Try to validate a single attribute for an element.

detaileddescription.para: Performs the following checks as described by the XML-1.0 recommendation:
ID/IDREF uniqueness and matching are handled separately.

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlValidCtxt *ctxt, xmlDoc *doc, xmlNode *elem, const xmlChar *prefix, xmlNs *ns, const xmlChar *value)
memberdef.name: xmlValidateOneNamespace

briefdescription.para: Try to validate a single namespace declaration for an element.

detaileddescription.para: Performs the following checks as described by the XML-1.0 recommendation:
ID/IDREF uniqueness and matching are handled separately.

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Performs the final step of document validation once all the incremental validation steps have been completed.

detaileddescription.para: Performs the following checks described by the XML Rec:

listitem.para: Check all the IDREF/IDREFS attributes definition for validity.

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Validate that the given name match a notation declaration.

detaileddescription.para: [ VC: Notation Declared ]

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Search in the DTDs whether an element accepts mixed content or ANY (basically if it is supposed to accept text children).

simplesect.para: 0 if no, 1 if yes, and -1 if no element description is available.

briefdescription.para: Search the DTD for the description of this attribute on this element.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to the DtD to search

simplesect.para: the xmlAttribute or NULL if not found.

memberdef.argsstring: (xmlDtd *dtd, const xmlChar *elem, const xmlChar *name, const xmlChar *prefix)
memberdef.name: xmlGetDtdQAttrDesc

briefdescription.para: Search the DTD for the description of this qualified attribute on this element.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to the DtD to search

simplesect.para: the xmlAttribute or NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: Search the DTD for the description of this notation.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to the DtD to search

simplesect.para: the xmlNotation or NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: Search the DTD for the description of this element.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to the DtD to search

simplesect.para: the xmlElement or NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: Search the DTD for the description of this element.

detaileddescription.para: NOTE: A NULL return value can also mean that a memory allocation failed.

parameterdescription.para: a pointer to the DtD to search

simplesect.para: the xmlElement or NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: Build/extend a list of potential children allowed by the content tree.

parameterdescription.para: an array to store the list of child names
a pointer to the number of element in the list

simplesect.para: the number of element in the list, or -1 in case of error.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the list of authorized children to insert within an existing tree while respecting the validity constraints forced by the Dtd.

detaileddescription.para: The insertion point is defined using prev and next in the following ways: to insert before 'node': xmlValidGetValidElements(node->prev, node, ... to insert next 'node': xmlValidGetValidElements(node, node->next, ... to replace 'node': xmlValidGetValidElements(node->prev, node->next, ... to prepend a child to 'node': xmlValidGetValidElements(NULL, node->childs, to append a child to 'node': xmlValidGetValidElements(node->last, NULL, ...
pointers to the element names are inserted at the beginning of the array and do not need to be freed.

parameterdescription.para: an array to store the list of child names

simplesect.para: the number of element in the list, or -1 in case of error. If the function returns the value max the caller is invited to grow the receiving array and retry.

briefdescription.para: Validate that the given value matches the Name production.

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Validate that the given value matches the Names production.

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Validate that the given value matches the Nmtoken production.

detaileddescription.para: [ VC: Name Token ]

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Validate that the given value matches the Nmtokens production.

detaileddescription.para: [ VC: Name Token ]

simplesect.para: 1 if valid or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: (Re)Build the automata associated to the content model of this element

simplesect.para: 1 in case of success, 0 in case of error

briefdescription.para: Push a new element start on the validation stack.

parameterdescription.para: the qualified name as appearing in the serialization

simplesect.para: 1 if no validation problem was found or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Check the CData parsed for validation in the current stack.

simplesect.para: 1 if no validation problem was found or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Pop the element end from the validation stack.

parameterdescription.para: the qualified name as appearing in the serialization

simplesect.para: 1 if no validation problem was found or 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: DTD validator.

detaileddescription.para: API to handle XML Document Type Definitions and validate documents.

simplesect.para: See Copyright for the status of this software.
Daniel Veillard
